name: headlesshost-mcp
description: A comprehensive Model Context Protocol (MCP) server that provides complete communication with the Headlesshost platform API endpoints. This server enables AI assistants to interact with all aspects of the Headlesshost platform including user management, content site operations, staging site management, content generation, analytics, and system administration.
